originalTitle: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping (2026) 'Meet Haymitch' – Joseph Zada
content: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping – in theaters & IMAX November 20. Subscribe to the LIONSGATE YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym https://www.instagram.com/thehungergames https://www.facebook.com/TheHungerGamesMovie https://www.threads.com/@thehungergames https://x.com/TheHungerGames https://www.tiktok.com/@hungergamesofficial #TheHungerGames THE HUNGER GAMES: SUNRISE ON THE REAPING will revisit the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games, starting on the morning of the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.
chineseContent: 《饥饿游戏：收割日出》- 11 月 20 日在影院和 IMAX 上映。订阅 LIONSGATE YouTube 频道以获取最新电影预告片、剪辑等：https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym https://www.instagram.com/thehungergames https://www.facebook.com/TheHungerGamesMovie https://www.threads.com/@thehungergames https://x.com/TheHungerGames https://www.tiktok.com/@hungergamesofficial #TheHungerGames 《饥饿游戏：收割日出》将从第 50 届饥饿游戏收割日（也称为第二季度平息）的早晨开始，重温《饥饿游戏》事件发生 24 年前的施惠国世界。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
